# Sofra

> Sofra (Turkish: a table laid for guests) is a restaurant-management platform
> handcrafted in Geneva, Switzerland: QR menus & online ordering, live order
> boards for kitchen/cashier/servers, reservations, loyalty points, and
> thermal-printer kitchen tickets — one warm-hearted system instead of five
> subscriptions.

Site: https://sofrapiwas.com (English: /en, French: /fr, Turkish: /tr)

## What Sofra does

- QR menus & ordering: guests scan, browse and order from the table — photos,
  allergens, customizations; no app install. Menus speak 9 languages
  (English, French, German, Italian, Turkish, Arabic, Japanese and more).
- Live order boards: kitchen, cashier and servers each get a real-time view;
  orders arrive the second they are placed.
- Reservations: online booking, table planning, working hours, one-tap approval.
- Loyalty: fidelity points and per-group discount rules that bring regulars back.
- Kitchen printing: a companion app (Windows + Android) drives ESC/POS thermal
  printers over the network.
- Domains: every restaurant gets a free subdomain; you can connect a domain
  you already own, or Sofra registers a new one for you during setup.

## Proof

Sofra runs every live service at RUMI Restaurant, Geneva
(https://www.rumirestaurant.ch) — orders, kitchen board, reservations and
printers, in production since June 2026.

## Pricing

Early access: free for founding restaurants ("on the house"), with white-glove
onboarding and a lifetime discount when regular pricing arrives. Regular
plans: simple flat monthly pricing with optional add-on modules. No card
required, no lock-in.

## For partners

Sofra runs a partner program (agencies/individuals who onboard restaurants and
earn commissions): https://sofrapiwas.com/#partner

## Contact

Waitlist / demo / quote: https://sofrapiwas.com/#waitlist
